name: TheRouter
description: Registers TheRouter as a first-party OpenAI-compatible provider with upstream chat and embedding model discovery.

env.description: Fallback TheRouter API key used for discovery, inference, and embeddings when no api_key Plugin Setting is configured.

settings.label: TheRouter API key
settings.description: TheRouter API key used for model discovery, inference, and embeddings. Falls back to THEROUTER_API_KEY.

providers.name: TheRouter
providers.description: Refreshes TheRouter chat models from the upstream catalog and serves them through Pi's OpenAI-compatible transport.

providers.name: TheRouter Embeddings
providers.description: Refreshes TheRouter embedding models and embeds text through TheRouter's embeddings API.
